ready_for_verification_description: Ozali na mya-testemunha {count} myasololwa. AFROLOC yaku ikwenda kusolola.
verification_options_description: Solola mu ma-metodu a kusolola a mingi mu kusolola kimbutu kyobe.
verify_process_step_2_desc: Ma-coordenada ya GPS masololwa ye ba-autoridade
verify_process_step_3_desc: AFROLOC yaku kikala kimbutu kya oficiale
primary_residence_updated: Inzo yaku ya mbote yasemunwa mbote
primary_residence_info: Eyi eyele endereso yaku ya kya kuvalala na bakonzi
about_description: Kubongolola mahemu a digital mu Afrika mu njila ya teknolojia ya kusangisa bantu onso, kudiminina kya komunidade ne georeferencing ya mbote.
mission_text: Kupesa muana-Afrika onso endereço digital ya kupambana, oyo ekoki kudiminina ne oyo etikalaka, kulendisa kusangana kya mbongo, kukola mu misalu ya ntina ne kulendisa kuzaba kya kontiná.
vision_text: Kukola sistema ya endereço digital ya kontiná oyo italisamaka, kusangisa bantu ya Afrika kuleka miliadi 1 ne kusala lokola infraestrutura ya ntina mpo bakoli ya libela ya kontiná.
values_subtitle: Mibeko ya ntina oyo ezali kutambwisa mabongo onso ne misalu
value_inclusion_desc: Tundimi ete muana-Afrika onso asengeli na endereço digital oyo ekoki kudiminina, kozanga kutala esika to eloko ya ekonomia na yandi.
value_security_desc: Tubatela kuzaba ne bosekrete ya basadisi mu njila ya kudiminina ya komunidade ne chiffrement ya likolo.
value_community_desc: Sistema endiminina na komunidade yango moko, kudiminisa bosolo ne kulendisa masanga ya komunidade.
value_interoperability_desc: Tutongaka sistema ya kontiná oyo esalaka kuleka mindelo, kusangisa Afrika mobimba.
journey_subtitle: Longwa na makanisi tii na bosolo ya kontiná
team_subtitle: Bantu ya mayele bapesami mpo bakongolola mahemu ya digital mu Afrika
cta_about_description: Zala eteni ya mouvement oyo ezali kubongolola mahemu ya digital mu Afrika
timeline_conception_desc: Kubanda kubongisa makanisi ya endereço digital ya kontiná mpo Afrika
timeline_prototyping_desc: Kubongisa ndakisa ya kala ne kumeka na ba komunidade mu Angola
timeline_community_validation_desc: Kutia sistema ya kudiminina na ba testemunhas ne ba nível ya kudiminina
timeline_regional_expansion_desc: Kubanda mu bikolo ebele ya Afrika na lisungi ya minoko mingi
timeline_financial_integration_desc: Kusangana na ba instituições ya mbongo mpo kusangana ya banco
timeline_public_api_desc: Kubanda API ya polele mpo ba desenvolvedores ne ba empresas
team_ceo_desc: PhD mu Sistemas d'Informação Geográfica, miaka 15 ya kuzaba mu infraestrutura digital ya Afrika.
team_cto_desc: Engenheiro mukulu ya kala ya Google Maps, especialista mu georeferência ne sistemas ya kukabwana.
team_community_desc: Atambwisaki ba projetos ya kusangana digital mu bikolo 12 ya Afrika, ayebi minoko 6 ya Afrika.
team_engineering_desc: Arquiteto ya sistemas na kuzaba mu ba plataformas ya minene ne blockchain.
admin_login_subtitle: Esika ya kubatama - kaka bantu oyo bapesami njila
admin_security_notice: Portal oyo ya kukota ezali kaka mpo ba administradores ya sistema. Mibondeli onso ya kukota ekomami ne etalelami.
access_denied_admin: Kukota eboyami. Privilégio ya mukambi esengeli.
welcome_admin: Boyei mbote na painel ya ukamba
enter_6_digit_code: Svp kutia código ya ba dígitos 6
max_attempts_exceeded: Mibondeli ya likolo eleki. Senga código ya sika.
verify_phone_first: Svp diminina telefone na nge yambu
too_many_attempts: Mibondeli mingi. Meka lisusu na sima.
download_app_subtitle: Zua sistema ya kuzaba mahemu mbala imosi mu telefone yaku
contact_subtitle: Tuena mu Afrika yoso. Sola região yaku ni longela etu.
subject: Assunto
faq_subtitle: Zua mavutu na mitanu ya mbala mingi mu AFROLOC
ios_important: Kima kia ntina ku asadisi a iPhone/iPad
ios_safari_required: Ku tula aplicação ayi mu iOS, ufwete kusadila navegador Safari. Kana uzadi kusadila navegador inkaka (Chrome, Firefox, etc.), kangula link ayi mu Safari mbala ya ntete.
scan_qr_code: Tanga Código QR na câmara ya telefone yaku
qr_instructions: Talisa câmara ya telefone yaku ku código yina izadi ku zulu mpe landa malongi sambu kutula aplicação
ios_attention: KEBA: Tala mbote nete uzadi kusadila Safari
ios_step1: Kangula sítio ayi mu Safari (navegador ya ntete ya iPhone)
ios_step2: Fina botão ya kukabola (icone ya quadrado na seta ikeyi ku zulu) ku nsi ya ecrã
ios_step3: Kita mu menu mpe fina "Bakisa ku Ecrã Principal"
ios_step4: Fina "Bakisa" ku kanto ya zulu ku diboko ya lubakala
ios_step5: Isila! Icone ya aplicação ikotala mu ecrã yaku ya kubanda
link_copied: Link ikopiami ku área de transferência
share_text: Tula aplicação ya AFROLOC mu aparelho yaku
install_directly: Tula mbala mosi mu aparelho yaku
android_step2: Fina menu (⋮) ku kanto ya zulu ku diboko ya lubakala
android_step3: Sola "Tula aplicação" vata "Bakisa ku ecrã principal"
use_smartphone: Sadila telefone yaku sambu experiência ileki mbote
to_install_mobile: Sambu kutula aplicação mu telefone yaku:
scan_qr_above: Vata tanga Código QR yina izadi ku zulu na telefone yaku
pwa_no_store: Progressive Web App (PWA) - Ikele ve sambu kukitisa mu loja ya aplicação
install_subtitle: Zua aplicação mbala mosi ku ecrã yaku ya kubanda, isalaka kukondwa internet!
app_already_installed: AFROLOC ituliami kala mu aparelho yaku
benefit_quick_access_desc: Banda mbala mosi ku ecrã ya kubanda bonso aplicação ya mboka
benefit_offline_desc: Zua dados yaku ata kukondwa internet
benefit_native_exp_desc: Interface ibongisamaki sambu telefone, kukondwa barra ya navegador
ios_install_step1: Fina botão ya Kukabola (quadrado na seta ikeyi ku zulu) mu Safari
ios_install_step2: Kita mpe fina "Bakisa ku Ecrã Principal"
ios_install_step3: Fina "Bakisa" ku kanto ya zulu ku diboko ya lubakala
ios_install_step4: Icone ya AFROLOC ikotala mu ecrã yaku ya kubanda
click_to_install: Fina botão yina izadi ku nsi sambu kutula
android_install_step1: Fina menu (pontos misatu) ku kanto ya zulu ku diboko ya lubakala ya Chrome
android_install_step2: Sola "Bakisa ku ecrã principal" vata "Tula aplicação"
android_install_step4: Icone ya AFROLOC ikotala mu ecrã yaku ya kubanda
pwa_preview_note: PWA isalaka mbote mingi kana aplicação ibimisami. Mu antevisão ya AFROLOC, minkumba minkaka ikoki kuzala na ndelo.
install_after_publish: Sambu kutula nsima ya kobimisa aplicação:
chrome_edge_install: Chrome/Edge: Icone ya kutula mu barra ya endereço
publish_instructions: Fina botão "Publish" mu AFROLOC sambu kuzua URL ya produção. Ku nsima zua URL wana mpe icone ya kutula ikotala automatico.
select_access_description: Kuata ndenge usakele kulongela mu sistema
hero_title: Sistema ya Mahamba ma Dijitale ya Kontinente
hero_description: Kimbutu kya dijitale kya mosi ye kya kusolola kwa mukanda muene ye mahamba ya Afrika, kusuekisa kubangana, kusambila ye kusambilana.
continental_system_badge: Sistema ya Mahamba ma Dijitale ya Kontinente
why_description: Makutu ya makutu ya bantu ba Afrika — mbala koleka 500 milhões — kaba na mahamba ma oficiale te
feature_addressing_desc: Kusolola mahamba ye GPS dibele mu makandala mana kuna jinzila ya mazina te
feature_validation_desc: Sistema ya masakisi ya ba-vizinhos ye ba-autoridade ya mahamba
feature_financial_desc: Kukota mu ma-servisu ya banka, kreditu ye seguro
feature_verification_desc: Kutalula kya dibele mu ngana 6-18 ku zona
feature_interoperability_desc: Kutalulua ku ma-nsi ye ma-estrutura ya administrason
feature_apis_desc: Kubangana kya kwikala ye fintech, korreiu ye e-governo
step1_desc: Solola nzo yaku ye GPS mu app ya telefone. Sistema ibaka AFROLOC ya ngana ku mahamba yaku ye estrutura ya administrason.
step2_desc: Ba-vizinhos batatu ye autoridade ya mahamba basolola nzo yaku. Kusolola kutalulua ye SMS oyi ye kusina dijitale.
step3_desc: Kutambula kya dibele ye ma-notifikason ya ngana (ngana 6-18 ku zona). Makandala muene malemba ye ngana.
cta_description: Bangana ye makutu ya bantu ba Angola ye mahamba ma dijitale ma kusolola
footer_copyright: © 2025 AFROLOC. Sistema ya Mahamba ma Dijitale ya Kontinente.
address_type_formal_desc: Mahamba ye dizina dya njila ye nimeru ya oficiale
address_type_informal_desc: Mahamba kasivele dizina dya njila kanga nimeru ya oficiale
footer_proposal: Proposta kwa União Africana ye Smart Africa Alliance
login_description: Kota mu konta yaku ya kimbutu kya dijitale
onboarding_description: Sola kima kiueza kusebenza. Kima kikututa kubinafsisa experiensa yaku.
purpose_identification_desc: Identifikason ya oficiali ne ma-dokumentu ya jinzo
language_updated_desc: Ludimi lwasololwa kiteleka kiso ludimi luya banikenwe
basic_info_desc: Isa nsi yaku ne mahamba yuikala kubinafsisa experiensa
location_permission_denied: Mvumo ya mahamba yakanganyikile. Vhura GPS.
location_error: Mbutu mu kusolola mahamba. Edza zvakale.
challenge_desc: Makutu ya makutu ya bantu ba Afrika — mbala koleka 500 milhões — kaba na mahamba ma oficiale te
challenge_step1_desc: Mu Kinshasa, Lagos, Luanda ye ma-cidade ya Afrika, makutu yakalanga dibele mahamba ma oficiale
challenge_step2_desc: Ma-ambulansa kafikanga te, ma-karta kaukundanga, ma-entrega kasuekele te
challenge_step3_desc: Ma-banku ya Afrika kalongi komprovanti ya mahamba mana bantu bangi kaba na ve
challenge_step4_desc: Kibakile kwa ye mu Afrika, kukunda ma-kima ya ma-cidade ya ye
addressing_desc: Kusolola mahamba ye GPS dibele mu makandala mana kuna jinzila ya mazina te
addressing_step1_title: Kuna Nzila Ve? Kuna Kisalu Ve!
addressing_step1_desc: Mu bairro ya Luanda oyi mu comuna ya Kinshasa, GPS iasololanga nzo yaku
addressing_step2_desc: Suekisile ku ma-divisão ya nsi yose: ma-província, ma-município, ma-setor, ma-bairro
addressing_step4_desc: Kusambila ye internet ya mbangu-mbangu, kina kye kyavele mu ma-cidade ya Afrika
validation_desc: Ma-autoridade ya administrason ya Afrika masolola ma-rejistu
validation_step1_desc: Musali ya administrason ya mahamba iaverisa ma-quarteirão ne kubaka ba-kala
validation_step2_desc: Kupandula 50-100 ma-rejistu ya bairro yose kwa kusolola dibele
validation_step3_desc: Autoridade ya mahamba iakanduka kimvula ne kubaka kima kya moyo
validation_step4_desc: Kwenda ku município, província, kukunda kimbangulu kya kutambula ya Afrika
financial_desc: Kukota mu ma-servisu ya banku, kreditu ne seguru mu Afrika
financial_step1_desc: BAI, BCI, Ecobank babaka AFROLOC kwa kukala konta ya ba-komersante ya informal
financial_step2_desc: Ma-kooperativa ne IMF ya Afrika maverisa kubaka ba-komersante ba kima
financial_step3_desc: M-Pesa, Orange Money mavereka ma-pagamento ya dijitale ku mahamba ya fisiku
financial_step4_desc: Ma-seguradora ya Afrika masuma proteson ku bantu bana kaba na kukota dibele ve
verification_desc: Atualizar yasuekisile ku kukua ya ma-cidade ya Afrika
verification_step1_desc: Luanda, Lagos, Kinshasa yawe mbangu: kusolola mu ngana 6
verification_step2_desc: Ma-zona ya ma-cidade yavereke: atualizar ya mvu muene ikwete
verification_step3_desc: Notifikason mu ma-canal ya kupumbula mu Afrika mu ngana ya kusolola
verification_step4_desc: Musali ya kimvula iaverisa oyi mukala iabaka mu posto ya administrason
interop_desc: Kutalulua ku ma-nsi 54 ya Afrika ne ma-estrutura ya ye
interop_step1_desc: Padrão yavereke mu UA ialula dibele Cairo ku Cape Town
interop_step2_desc: Nsi yose iakanduka estrutura ye: wilaya, région, province, estado
interop_step3_desc: Kusuekisa komérsiu mu ma-komunidade ya ekonomia ya rejon ya Afrika
interop_step4_desc: ONU, Banco Mundial, DHL mabaka AFROLOC kina mahamba ya moyo
apis_desc: Kubangana ye ekosistema dijitale ya Afrika
apis_step1_desc: API REST ne ma-exemplo kwa ba-desenvolvedore ya Afrika kubangana kwikala
apis_step2_desc: Flutterwave, Paystack, Yoco mabaka mahamba mu tempo real
apis_step3_desc: E-commerce ya Afrika maverisa kusuekisa ma-entrega ne mahamba ya moyo
apis_step4_desc: Ma-ministério mabangana kwa sensu, saúde, educason ne ma-servisu ya social
process_geo_desc: Solola nzo yaku ye GPS mu app ya telefone
process_wit_desc: Bavizinhu batatu masolola nzo ne identidade yaku
process_val_desc: Ma-autoridade ya administrason ya mahamba masolola nzo yaku
process_ver_desc: Kutambula otomatiki mu ma-notifikason (ngana 6-18 ku zona)
gpsDiscrepancyDescription: Lokalizasaun ya aparelhu kia kombina ku lokalizasaun ya foto. Kima kiatalela manipulasaun.
kpi_performance_metrics: Metrikas ya desempenho ya sistema AFROLOC
kpi_certification_description: Metrikas ya desempenho ya sistema AFROLOC
ats_subtitle: Pontuasaun ya verifikason ya mahamba multicamada
ats_tooltip_description: ATS ialya pontuasaun ponderada (0-100) baseada mu presisaun GPS, sinais ya telekomunikason, validason EXIF, konfirmasaun ya basakusi ne dokumentason.
ats_category_gps_description: Presisaun ya lokalizason ne validason GPS
ats_category_telecom_description: Triangulason ya sinal ne validason kruzada
ats_category_exif_description: Metadados ya foto ne verifikason ya aparelhu
kpi_region_comparison_desc: Kompara metrikas ya sertifikason entre rejon diferentes
alert_thresholds_description: Monitoramento otomatiku ya metrikas ku rejon
alert_threshold_witness: Taxa Mínima ya Konfirmasaun ya Basakusi
alert_no_issues: Rejon yanone ye metrikas abaixo ya thresholds
alert_disabled_message: Ativa alertas para monitorar metrikas regionais
create_first_afroloc: Baka AFROLOC yaku yakutanga para kubandakesa ye mahamba dijitali
manage_your_afroloc_addresses: Jerir mahamba yaku AFROLOC mu lugar mosi
add_first_address_description: Bandakesa kudikisona mahamba yaku AFROLOC yakutanga para kubandakesa identidade dijitale yaku
phone_login_description: Kota ye numeru ya telefone yaku
otp_sent_desc: Kodigo ya verifikason yatuminile ku telefone yaku
reset_password_description: Isa email yaku para ukala link ya reset
signup_password_description: Baka palavra-passe segura para konta yaku
max_addresses_reached: Wenda kufika limite máximo ya 3 mahamba AFROLOC basontile. Para kudikisona mahamba ya mona, deleta mosi ya yaikala.
duplicate_address_error: Samba kuna mahamba AFROLOC ye lokalizason seme ne tipu ya propriedade. Sambela tipu diferente (residênsia, komersial, terreno, etc.).
delete_address_confirm: Wana oserteza ya kukuata kudeletar mahamba AFROLOC kima? Akason kima kiapodye kuvutulula.
door_photo_description: Foto ya porta ya residênsia yaku
photo_required_desc: Kufika foto ya porta para kutambula
witness_request_sent_desc: Kutumina pedido ya konfirmasaun ku musakusi
witnesses_required_desc: Kulongeka musakusi batatu para kusolola mahamba yaku
confirm_witness_description: Wasolola kina mundu kima ikala mu mahamba kima?
witness_confirmation_description: Yatuminile pedido para kusolola residênsia ya muvizinhu
i_confirm_residence: Kisolola kina mundu kima ikala mu mahamba kima
enter_otp_code: Isa kodigo OTP yatuminile ku telefone yaku
verification_complete_desc: Numeru ya telefone yaku yasolola sambilu
verification_failed_desc: Kiapodye kusolola numeru ya telefone yaku
too_many_attempts_desc: Wakuedzwa bangi wipe. Kangela ne edza zvakale.
user_levels_description: Kumprende sistema ya nivel ya autorizason
level_3_desc: Ba-autoridade administrativo ye poder ya kuprovason
fraud_flags_description: Mona ne rezolve bandeiras ya fraude
delete_user_confirm: Wana oserteza ya kukuata kudeletar ba-utelizadore kima? Akason kima kiapodye kuvutulula.
cell_towers_description: Jerir dados ya torres ya célula
validator_management_description: Jerir validadore ne jurisdison ya ye
authority_validation_description: Verifikason GPS ne kuprovason ya autoridade
delete_account_confirm: Wana oserteza ya kukuata kudeletar konta yaku? Akason kima kiapodye kuvutulula.
name: Dizina
page_not_found_desc: Paji ya ukusaka kiaikala oyi yafikiswe
offline_data_saved_desc: Dados yaku yasalvadu ne iasinkronisa nakuvhela koneson
creator: Kireador
author: Mutor
title: Título
label: Rótulo
quick_login_available: Kota mbangu yaikala disponível para aparelhu kima
device_saved: Aparelhu yasalvadu para kota mbangu (30 mvu)
manage_trusted_devices: Jerir aparelhus ya konfiansa para kota mbangu
revoke_device_confirm: Revogar status ya konfiansa ya aparelhu kima?
no_trusted_devices_desc: Ove kuna aparelhus basalvadu para kota mbangu
biometric_not_available: Autentikason biométrika kiaikala disponível neste aparelhu
door_photo_instruction: Kufika foto ya porta ya residênsia yaku
install_pwa_description: Instalar AFROLOC ku aparelhu yaku para akesso mbangu
phone_changed_desc: Numeru ya telefone yaku yasololokele sambilu
backup_codes_warning: Salvar kodigo kima. Ye kiamostradu zvakale.
verification_cycle_frequency: Frequênsia yataladele ku {score} pontos ya risku
address_update_description: Tondisa mahemu manga mi okuti enzila yaku yapewa liyina lya ofisial vo inzo yaku yapewa inumbulu oyo epesewi kwa governu ya esika. Sistema ekoseka mutango ya endereço kutala informal kukola formal.
official_name_by_admin: Liyina lya ofisial oyo epesewi kwa governu
official_number_by_admin: Inumbulu ya ofisial oyo epesewi kwa governu
address_type_explanation: Vosi kutondisa liyina lya enzila NE inumbulu, endereço ekakala na mutango ya Formal. Ovo kayi, ekakala Informal. Endereço ekakala Digital vosi va certificação kwa autoridades.
delete_address_warning: Uyenu uyivwa ukufumbisa endereço yau ya AFROLOC? Kiezo kyau ka kivu kala.
mitigation_add_house_number: Futisa numelu ya nzo kutangunukisa risku
mitigation_property_monitoring: Kima kya propriedade kima kitela kutaladela kwengi
mitigation_gps_authority_validation: Verifikason ya GPS ya autoridade yitaladela
mitigation_gps_required: Koordinadas ya GPS yitela kutangunukisa risku
mitigation_add_more_witnesses: Futisa matestemunha yengi kukala na verifikason
mitigation_add_witnesses: Futisa matestemunha mu verifikason ya komunidade
mitigation_improve_ats: Melora pontos ya ATS na verifikasons yengi
mitigation_low_ats: Pontos ya ATS yapidila - verifikasons yengi yitela
mitigation_over_1_year: Verifikason ya kusakana - yamana yapidila mvu 1
mitigation_never_verified: Endereço ka yaverifikadele dyambu ya rejisto
witnesses_required_message: Osala na matestemunha {count} makonfirmadu mu kuverifikar AFROLOC yaku
witness_contract_legal_note: Testemunha aki asinadu kontrato legale akonfirmando ke omunu wakizela muntu wakala ye averifika verdade ya informasons ya endereço. Asisinatura yena bali legale.
waiting_for_witness_confirmation: Tutela testemunha akonfirmar ye asinar kontrato
once_witnesses_confirm_authority_validat: Wakala matestemunha makonfirmadu, autoridade ikwenda kuvalidar AFROLOC yaku
upload_manage_documents_desc: Futisa ye gere ma-dokumentu ya verifikason ya identidade yaku
upload_documents_to_verify: Futisa ma-dokumentu ya identidade mu kuverifikar AFROLOC yaku
quick_action_verify_desc: U ka tuminwa ku tanga o prosésu ya verifkasãu ya enderesu ya mundu ya AFROLOC.
quick_action_report_desc: U ka tuminwa ku kizua ya ku sola ni ku tala relatóriu ya milonga.
quick_action_users_desc: U ka tuminwa ku kizua ya ku tonga asaleli ya sistema.
no_record_found_desc: Enderesu yove u londola ka i singile mu ka ilikuvo. Tala identifikadu ni utente diaka, mu vutuka ku lista ya aenderesu.
no_reports_desc: Verifkasãu ka i soñwa mu txilitu txasoluwa. Lundulula txilitu ya ku onongoñoña mu linga verifkasãu ya mundu ku solwa.
no_users_found_desc: Asaleli ka a lingana ni vikritériu ya ku sola. Utente ku lundulula vifiltru mu ku sola kwé.
